pattern_name: Register dimension as CSV + Pydantic SSOT + validator + Supabase mirror
acceptance_criteria_human: An author can mint a new register by reading the pattern narrative and copying the established 4-file shape (CSV + Pydantic + validator + migration)
acceptance_criteria_automation: validate_hlk.py umbrella runs the new validator and Supabase mirror migration applies cleanly
notes: Foundational pattern; instantiated by every dimension under canonicals/dimensions/. Sibling of pattern_classification_lattice (which the registers index against)

pattern_name: Paired SOP + executable runbook per process_list row
acceptance_criteria_human: An author can author a Markdown SOP and a paired Python runbook side-by-side; validate_process_list_pairing.py confirms the pair
acceptance_criteria_automation: validate_process_list_pairing.py PASS for the row in process_list.csv
notes: Codified at akos-executable-process-catalog.mdc Rule 1; AC-binary axis (human/automation) per D-IH-72-S

pattern_name: Engagement-class taxonomy (retribution x SOC x IP x knowledge-access)
acceptance_criteria_human: A new collaborator scenario can be classified into one of the 7 engagement classes by reading the registry
acceptance_criteria_automation: validate_engagement_model_registry.py PASS confirming all 7 classes present
notes: The 7-class taxonomy hourly_consultant / milestone_consultant / percentage_collaborator / apprentice_learner / investor_advisor / outsourced_helper / operator_self per D-IH-73-D

pattern_name: Persona registry as queryable cross-area dimension
acceptance_criteria_human: A new persona surfaces during a scenario and can be added by reading the registry's row pattern
notes: Originally Marketing-owned but generalises to any area needing a queryable cast of stakeholders. Sibling of pattern_intelligenceops_register

pattern_name: Intelligence-collection contracts against named identity-side targets
acceptance_criteria_human: A new target type (regulator / media / recruiter / competitor) can be added by extending the target_class enum and adding rows
notes: Sibling-not-extension of GOI_POI_REGISTER (D-IH-72-H); intelligence-collection lifecycles are distinct from identity capture

pattern_name: Adapter registry with status + cadence + Data Owner per Normalized Adapter Pattern
acceptance_criteria_human: A new external integration (CRM / billing / email / contract / scheduling) is added by minting an adapter row with status enum + Data Owner FK
acceptance_criteria_automation: validate_adapter_registries.py PASS for all 8 sibling adapter registries
notes: Per Truto + Unified.to + Apideck industry consensus 2026; cadence taxonomy per D-IH-72-Q (on_demand / scheduled / event_triggered / gated_operator)

acceptance_criteria_human: Any new artefact carries access_level + confidence_level + source_taxonomy frontmatter that resolves into the three lattices
acceptance_criteria_automation: LANGUAGE_FRONTMATTER + access_level coverage spot-check during validate_hlk.py
notes: Foundational pattern; every register and SOP inherits it. Lattice values authored as Markdown canonicals not CSV

pattern_name: Internal canonical + external canonical translation pair
acceptance_criteria_human: An internal canonical's vocabulary translates into the external canonical's vocabulary without loss of meaning
notes: Originated brand-baseline-reality but applies to any internal/external twin (e.g.

pattern_name: Automated CI drift gate enforcing a canonical surface
acceptance_criteria_human: A new canonical surface can be guarded by writing a Python validator that scans for forbidden tokens or shape violations
acceptance_criteria_automation: The validator runs in pre_commit profile via verification-profiles.json
notes: Anti-jargon drift gate (I79 P2; D-IH-79-N) is the second instantiation; brand-baseline-reality (I66 P2) was the first. Mirrors the same shape: scan + token-list + INFO-then-FAIL graduation

pattern_name: Inline-ratify gate via AskQuestion replacing real-stop operator pause
acceptance_criteria_human: An execution-time decision that needs operator input is surfaced via AskQuestion in the same chat (not a real-stop pause record)
acceptance_criteria_automation: AskQuestion call carries options + rationale + recommended-default; inline ratification recorded in initiative decision-log.md
notes: Saves operator chat-switch cost for evidence-dependent / spot-check decisions; only canonical-CSV-gate / trademark / public-prose-publish use real-stop pauses

pattern_name: When a People pattern row mints propagate to consuming areas
acceptance_criteria_human: People mints a pattern row; consuming areas receive announcement and migrate their relevant process_list rows to set inherited_pattern_id FK
acceptance_criteria_automation: peopl_cross_area_breakthrough_announce.py runbook fires when a pattern row is added/revised; Tech Lab pingback fires when AGENTIC_FRAMEWORK_LANDSCAPE.md is touched
notes: The meta-pattern of People-as-DoD. Sibling of pattern_paired_sop_runbook (which gives the pattern its mechanical surface)

pattern_name: Forward layout convention plane x program x topic for canonical surfaces
acceptance_criteria_human: A new program or topic is housed under compliance/<plane>/ + _assets/<plane>/<program_id>/<topic_id>/ + <role>/programs/<program_id>/
acceptance_criteria_automation: validate_hlk_km_manifests.py PASS confirming manifest paths resolve
notes: Initiative 22 / D-IH-22-A; not a CSV pattern but the layout discipline every register inherits. Cross-references TOPIC_REGISTRY + PROGRAM_REGISTRY (sibling dimensions)

pattern_name: SOP body and addendum split for executor-first plain-language documentation
acceptance_criteria_human: An author can mint a new SOP body and a paired *.addendum.md side-by-side; SOP-META Body and Addendum split rubric clarifies what goes where (executor-context vs supporting-context test)
acceptance_criteria_automation: validate_design_pattern_registry.py --jargon-scan PASS on body file; sibling *.addendum.md auto-discovered and reported as exempt; suffix-based reject defense-in-depth at scan time
notes: I80 P1 mint per D-IH-80-B paired-file default for DAMA-DMBOK 2.0 readiness (Metadata Management + RMDM + Data Integration alignment). Sibling pattern_paired_sop_runbook focuses on executable artifacts (SOP+runbook); this pattern focuses on reader-audience layering (executor body + auditor/system-owner addendum). First instantiation lands at I80 P2 (HOLISTIKA_STAKEHOLDER_LENSES.md + .addendum.md). Single-file remains the degenerate case when the SOP has no addendum-worthy content. Forward-charters future patterns of same shape (pattern_executor_first_documentation; pattern_per_audience_view).
